name: House Robber - Robbery Bob
description: Do you want to be a thief? House Robber, a game of thieves, will give you a chance. As a robber, you need to sneak into the house and steal various goods. You can take all the things you want. The premise is that you can safely evacuate the scene without being discovered or caught by security. Many scenes are waiting for you to challenge. Let's begin the exciting stealing trip now! Good luck!
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Fun, H5, House, HTML5, Kid, Kids, Stealth
